title: Outdoorsy
description: An Overhaul to Vanilla Biome Generation, also adding Enchantments, Decorative Blocks and Woodsets.
body:
Outdoorsy is a WorldGen mod that manages to capture real life's enviromental forestry feeling by making your world far more sparse and vivid. You will encounter a completely **New Forest Generation system**, by the hand of **New Decorative Blocks, Woodsets and Enchantments**. The mod mainly focuses on working out existing biomes rather than adding new ones, in order to fill them with new content for a **fully complete experience**.



_Want to know more about which features this mod will be adding?_



**World Generation:**
- Revamped Forest Generation
- Overhauled Swamp Biome.
- Reworked Taiga Biome.
- Added Big Rocks to Rivers and Stony Shores.

**Blocks:**

- Pine Woodset: Found in Taigas and ocasionally on Forests. Can be farmed with pinecones.
Rotten Woodset: Found in Swamps, can be obtained by right clicking any wood element with rotten flesh.
- Woodchips: A flammable block with gravity. Found in forests, crafted with 4 bark.
Logjam: A block that boosts mushroom growth, found in swamps and obtained by making woodchips enter contact with water.
- Pebbles: Can be stacked up to four on the same block and can be used to take any block to the ground by throwing them. Also will break Leaves and Ice.

**Items:**

- Bark: Will now drop when stripping wood and used to repair logs. Compatible with any mod.
